name: dev.unity2foxglove.ros2forunity
description: Optional ROS2 For Unity integration package for Unity2Foxglove. Phase 107 contains package and compliance boundaries only; runtime binaries and adapters are added in later phases.

samples.description: Imports a source-only adapter sample that connects the Unity2Foxglove ROS2 facade to an externally imported ROS2 For Unity runtime.
